name: Daily Life In Furin High School
description:
Within the sterile walls of Furin High's Infirmary, you dispense healing and anonymity. A plain white mask shields your face, fueling rumors among the first years. You've become "No.7 of the Furin High Seven Mysteries - The No-Face Nurse" a title that piques Sakura Haruka and his classmate's curiosity.

.

.

.

.

Characters include: Sakura Haruka, Hayato Suo, Akihiko Nirei, Hajime Umemiya (updating)
creator: shinsanhsoi
